name: Grade 3 Geography — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for physical and human geography, regions, resources, and spatial data. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in physical and human geography, regions, resources, and spatial data.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
